requirement_topic.en: KC Mark — EMC Emissions (Radiated and Conducted) — KN 32 / CISPR 32
requirement_topic.zh: KC认证——EMC辐射骚扰（辐射及传导）——KN 32 / CISPR 32
requirement_topic.zht: KC認證——EMC輻射騷擾（輻射及傳導）——KN 32 / CISPR 32

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices placed on the South Korean market must comply with electromagnetic emissions limits (radiated and conducted) under the Korean National Standard KN 32, which aligns with CISPR 32 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Emission requirements). EMC emissions compliance is incorporated within the unified KC Mark certification scheme administered by KATS (Korean Agency for Technology and Standards) under MOTIE (Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy) for general electronic/electrical products, and is also assessed as part of the NRRA KC radio certification for radio equipment. Class B limits apply to consumer and household IoT devices. Testing must be carried out by a KC-accredited conformity assessment body. Test reports must reference KN 32 measurement methods and limits. Radiated emission limits cover the 30 MHz–1 GHz and above frequency range; conducted emission limits apply to mains-connected devices. For radio equipment, EMC emissions are verified as part of the KC radio equipment certification process (NRRA), meaning a single KC Mark submission can address both radio and EMC emissions requirements simultaneously.
summary.zh: 向韩国市场投放的无线及物联网设备须符合韩国国家标准KN 32（与CISPR 32对应，即多媒体设备电磁兼容——辐射骚扰要求）规定的电磁辐射骚扰限值（辐射及传导）。EMC辐射合规纳入统一KC认证体系：对于一般电子/电气产品，由产业通商资源部（MOTIE）下属韩国产品安全协会（KATS）管理；对于无线电设备，作为NRRA KC无线电认证的组成部分进行评估。B类限值适用于消费类及家用物联网设备。测试须由KC认可合格评定机构进行，测试报告须参照KN 32测量方法及限值。辐射骚扰限值覆盖30 MHz至1 GHz及以上频率范围；传导骚扰限值适用于主电源连接设备。对于无线电设备，EMC辐射要求作为KC无线电设备认证程序（NRRA）的一部分进行验证，即单次KC标志申报可同时满足无线电及EMC辐射要求。
summary.zht: 向韓國市場投放的無線及物聯網裝置須符合韓國國家標準KN 32（與CISPR 32對應，即多媒體設備電磁兼容——輻射騷擾要求）規定的電磁輻射騷擾限值（輻射及傳導）。EMC輻射合規納入統一KC認證體系：對於一般電子/電氣產品，由產業通商資源部（MOTIE）下屬韓國產品安全協會（KATS）管理；對於無線電設備，作為NRRA KC無線電認證的組成部分進行評估。B類限值適用於消費類及家用物聯網裝置。測試須由KC認可合格評定機構進行，測試報告須參照KN 32測量方法及限值。輻射騷擾限值覆蓋30 MHz至1 GHz及以上頻率範圍；傳導騷擾限值適用於主電源連接設備。對於無線電設備，EMC輻射要求作為KC無線電設備認證程序（NRRA）的一部分進行驗證，即單次KC標誌申報可同時滿足無線電及EMC輻射要求。

standards_or_laws: KN 32 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment: Emission requirements (aligned with CISPR 32, KATS / MOTIE)
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — KC EMC certification for consumer electronics (KATS / MOTIE)
Radio Waves Act (전파법) Article 58-2 — EMC emissions verified as part of KC radio equipment certification (NRRA / MSIT)

summary.en: China addresses EMC emissions for information technology and multimedia equipment through GB 9254 (Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement), aligned with CISPR 22/32, and GB 17625 series for conducted emissions. Products within CCC scope must be certified before sale, with EMC testing by a CNCA-designated CNAS-accredited laboratory. Non-CCC-scope products may use self-declaration against applicable GB standards. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC certificates do not satisfy Korean KN 32 / KC EMC requirements; separate KC testing is mandatory.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 9254（信息技术设备无线电骚扰特性——限值和测量方法，与CISPR 22/32对应）及GB 17625系列（传导骚扰）处理信息技术及多媒体设备的EMC辐射要求。纳入CCC范围的产品在华销售前须经CNCA指定的CNAS认可实验室完成认证测试；非CCC范围产品可依据适用GB标准进行自我声明。中国GB 9254 / CCC EMC证书不满足韩国KN 32 / KC EMC要求；须单独进行KC测试。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 9254（信息技術設備無線電騷擾特性——限值和測量方法，與CISPR 22/32對應）及GB 17625系列（傳導騷擾）處理信息技術及多媒體設備的EMC輻射要求。納入CCC範圍的產品在華銷售前須經CNCA指定的CNAS認可實驗室完成認證測試；非CCC範圍產品可依據適用GB標準進行自我聲明。中國GB 9254 / CCC EMC證書不滿足韓國KN 32 / KC EMC要求；須單獨進行KC測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC/MIIT, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625 series — Conducted disturbance limits for household appliances and similar equipment (SAC)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — EMC component for in-scope products (CNCA / CNAS-accredited labs)

gap.en: Chinese GB 9254 test reports and CCC EMC certificates do not satisfy South Korean KN 32 / KC EMC emissions requirements. Key differences: (1) KN 32 uses CISPR 32 measurement methods specific to multimedia equipment, while China uses GB 9254 / CISPR 22 methods — different emission classes, frequency scan ranges, and quasi-peak/average detector requirements may apply; (2) Korean Class B limits for consumer IoT devices must be independently demonstrated to KN 32 limits; (3) testing must be conducted by a KC-accredited body — Chinese CNAS-designated labs do not hold Korean KC accreditation unless separately certified; (4) a common compliance gap is assuming CE EMC report acceptance — South Korea does not accept CE DoC or EU harmonised standard test reports in lieu of KC EMC testing. For wireless devices, EMC emissions are assessed concurrently with radio KC certification under NRRA, so a single KC application addresses both — manufacturers should confirm with their NRRA-designated lab that both radio and EMC emissions scopes are covered in the same submission.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254检测报告及CCC EMC证书不满足韩国KN 32 / KC EMC辐射骚扰要求。主要差异：（1）KN 32采用CISPR 32针对多媒体设备的测量方法，中国使用GB 9254 / CISPR 22方法——辐射等级、频率扫描范围及准峰值/均值检波器要求可能存在差异；（2）消费类物联网设备的韩国B类限值须依据KN 32独立证明；（3）测试须由KC认可机构进行——中国CNAS指定实验室除非已单独获得韩国KC认可，否则不具备相应资质；（4）常见合规差距是误以为韩国接受CE EMC报告——韩国不接受以CE DoC或欧盟协调标准测试报告替代KC EMC测试。对于无线设备，EMC辐射要求与NRRA无线电KC认证同步评估，单次KC申请即可同时满足两项要求——制造商应与NRRA指定实验室确认同一申请已涵盖无线电和EMC辐射两项测试范围。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254檢測報告及CCC EMC證書不滿足韓國KN 32 / KC EMC輻射騷擾要求。主要差異：（1）KN 32採用CISPR 32針對多媒體設備的測量方法，中國使用GB 9254 / CISPR 22方法——輻射等級、頻率掃描範圍及準峰值/均值檢波器要求可能存在差異；（2）消費類物聯網裝置的韓國B類限值須依據KN 32獨立證明；（3）測試須由KC認可機構進行——中國CNAS指定實驗室除非已單獨獲得韓國KC認可，否則不具備相應資質；（4）常見合規差距是誤以為韓國接受CE EMC報告——韓國不接受以CE DoC或歐盟協調標準測試報告替代KC EMC測試。對於無線設備，EMC輻射要求與NRRA無線電KC認證同步評估，單次KC申請即可同時滿足兩項要求——製造商應與NRRA指定實驗室確認同一申請已涵蓋無線電和EMC輻射兩項測試範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KN 32 KC EMC emissions certification required for consumer electronics and wireless IoT devices before South Korea market entry under Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act and Radio Waves Act
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (CCC-scope products) or self-declaration (non-CCC products) — GB 9254 EMC emissions compliance required under SAC/MIIT framework

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS) — Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KN 32 KC EMC emissions compliance is mandatory for consumer wireless and IoT devices before South Korea market entry. Chinese GB 9254 / CCC EMC documentation is not equivalent. Testing must be conducted by a KC-accredited conformity assessment body using KN 32 (CISPR 32-aligned) methods. Class B limits apply to household consumer IoT devices. For radio equipment, EMC emissions testing may be consolidated within the NRRA KC radio certification application. CE EMC reports are not accepted as a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 消费类无线及物联网设备进入韩国市场前，须强制满足KN 32 KC EMC辐射骚扰合规要求。中国GB 9254 / CCC EMC文件不具同等效力。须由KC认可合格评定机构采用KN 32（CISPR 32对应）方法进行测试。B类限值适用于家用消费类物联网设备。对于无线电设备，EMC辐射测试可与NRRA KC无线电认证申请合并进行。CE EMC报告不被接受作为替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 消費類無線及物聯網裝置進入韓國市場前，須強制滿足KN 32 KC EMC輻射騷擾合規要求。中國GB 9254 / CCC EMC文件不具同等效力。須由KC認可合格評定機構採用KN 32（CISPR 32對應）方法進行測試。B類限值適用於家用消費類物聯網裝置。對於無線電設備，EMC輻射測試可與NRRA KC無線電認證申請合並進行。CE EMC報告不被接受作為替代。

requirement_topic.en: KC Mark — EMC Immunity (EMS) — KN 35 / CISPR 35

summary.en: Consumer wireless and IoT devices placed on the South Korean market must also satisfy electromagnetic immunity (EMS) requirements under the Korean National Standard KN 35, which aligns with CISPR 35 (Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment — Immunity requirements). KN 35 sets immunity performance criteria for multimedia equipment including IoT routers, smart-home hubs, and wireless consumer devices against disturbance phenomena including electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transient (EFT/burst), surge, conducted RF disturbances, radiated RF immunity, power frequency magnetic field, and voltage dips and interruptions. Testing is performed by KC-accredited conformity assessment bodies and is assessed as part of the KC EMC certification under the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act administered by KATS/MOTIE, or as part of the NRRA KC radio equipment certification for radio devices. Immunity testing is distinct from emissions testing and requires separate test setups and performance criteria evaluation.
summary.zh: 向韩国市场投放的消费类无线及物联网设备还须满足韩国国家标准KN 35（与CISPR 35对应，即多媒体设备电磁兼容——抗扰度要求）规定的电磁抗扰度（EMS）要求。KN 35为物联网路由器、智能家居中枢及无线消费设备等多媒体设备规定了针对以下骚扰现象的抗扰度性能准则：静电放电（ESD）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（EFT/Burst）、浪涌、传导射频骚扰、辐射射频抗扰、工频磁场及电压暂降与中断。测试由KC认可合格评定机构进行，作为KATS/MOTIE管理的《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》下KC EMC认证的组成部分进行评估，或对于无线电设备，作为NRRA KC无线电设备认证的一部分。抗扰度测试与辐射骚扰测试相互独立，需单独进行测试配置和性能准则评价。
summary.zht: 向韓國市場投放的消費類無線及物聯網裝置還須滿足韓國國家標準KN 35（與CISPR 35對應，即多媒體設備電磁兼容——抗擾度要求）規定的電磁抗擾度（EMS）要求。KN 35為物聯網路由器、智能家居中樞及無線消費設備等多媒體設備規定了針對以下騷擾現象的抗擾度性能準則：靜電放電（ESD）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（EFT/Burst）、浪湧、傳導射頻騷擾、輻射射頻抗擾、工頻磁場及電壓暫降與中斷。測試由KC認可合格評定機構進行，作為KATS/MOTIE管理的《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》下KC EMC認證的組成部分進行評估，或對於無線電設備，作為NRRA KC無線電設備認證的一部分。抗擾度測試與輻射騷擾測試相互獨立，需單獨進行測試配置和性能準則評價。

standards_or_laws: KN 35 — Electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment: Immunity requirements (aligned with CISPR 35, KATS / MOTIE)
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — KC EMC immunity for consumer electronics (KATS / MOTIE)
Radio Waves Act (전파법) Article 58-2 — EMC immunity assessed as part of KC radio equipment certification (NRRA / MSIT)

summary.en: China does not mandate a separate EMC immunity (EMS) certification for most consumer wireless and IoT products; immunity testing is required only for products falling within specific CCC product categories where the applicable GB standard includes immunity requirements. Relevant Chinese standards include GB/T 17626 series (IEC 61000-4 series aligned) for ESD, EFT, surge, conducted RF, and radiated RF immunity. For CCC-scope products with immunity requirements, testing is conducted by a CNCA-designated CNAS-accredited laboratory. Chinese immunity test reports under GB/T 17626 do not satisfy Korean KN 35 KC immunity requirements.
summary.zh: 对于大多数消费类无线及物联网产品，中国不强制要求单独的EMC抗扰度（EMS）认证；仅对纳入特定CCC产品类别、且适用GB标准含抗扰度要求的产品才须进行抗扰度测试。相关中国标准包括GB/T 17626系列（与IEC 61000-4系列对应），涵盖ESD、EFT、浪涌、传导射频及辐射射频抗扰度。对于含抗扰度要求的CCC范围产品，测试须由CNCA指定的CNAS认可实验室进行。依据GB/T 17626出具的中国抗扰度测试报告不满足韩国KN 35 KC抗扰度要求。
summary.zht: 對於大多數消費類無線及物聯網產品，中國不強制要求單獨的EMC抗擾度（EMS）認證；僅對納入特定CCC產品類別、且適用GB標準含抗擾度要求的產品才須進行抗擾度測試。相關中國標準包括GB/T 17626系列（與IEC 61000-4系列對應），涵蓋ESD、EFT、浪湧、傳導射頻及輻射射頻抗擾度。對於含抗擾度要求的CCC範圍產品，測試須由CNCA指定的CNAS認可實驗室進行。依據GB/T 17626出具的中國抗擾度測試報告不滿足韓國KN 35 KC抗擾度要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility: Testing and measurement techniques (aligned with IEC 61000-4 series, SAC)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — EMS component for in-scope product categories only (CNCA)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17626 EMS test reports do not satisfy Korean KN 35 KC immunity requirements. Key gaps: (1) KN 35 (CISPR 35-aligned) immunity test levels, performance criteria, and applicable disturbance phenomena may differ from those in Chinese CCC EMS standards; (2) for products where China does not require EMS testing (non-CCC-scope devices), there is no existing Chinese EMS report available — a complete new KN 35 immunity test campaign is required for the Korean market; (3) testing must be conducted by a KC-accredited body, not a Chinese CNAS lab unless it holds separate Korean KC accreditation; (4) a common oversight: exporters assume emissions-only compliance (GB 9254 / SRRC) covers all EMC obligations — Korean KC requires both emissions and immunity to be demonstrated. Manufacturers should confirm with their KC-accredited test lab which EMS phenomena and performance criteria levels apply to their specific product category under KN 35.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626 EMS测试报告不满足韩国KN 35 KC抗扰度要求。主要差距：（1）KN 35（CISPR 35对应）抗扰度测试等级、性能准则及适用骚扰现象与中国CCC EMS标准可能存在差异；（2）对于中国不要求EMS测试的产品（非CCC范围设备），无现有中国EMS报告可用——须为韩国市场重新进行完整的KN 35抗扰度测试；（3）测试须由KC认可机构进行，中国CNAS实验室除非单独持有韩国KC认可资质，否则不具备相应资格；（4）常见疏忽：出口商误以为仅满足辐射骚扰合规要求（GB 9254 / SRRC）即可覆盖全部EMC义务——韩国KC要求同时证明辐射骚扰和抗扰度合规。制造商应与KC认可测试实验室确认KN 35下其具体产品类别适用的EMS骚扰现象和性能准则等级。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626 EMS測試報告不滿足韓國KN 35 KC抗擾度要求。主要差距：（1）KN 35（CISPR 35對應）抗擾度測試等級、性能準則及適用騷擾現象與中國CCC EMS標準可能存在差異；（2）對於中國不要求EMS測試的產品（非CCC範圍設備），無現有中國EMS報告可用——須為韓國市場重新進行完整的KN 35抗擾度測試；（3）測試須由KC認可機構進行，中國CNAS實驗室除非單獨持有韓國KC認可資質，否則不具備相應資格；（4）常見疏忽：出口商誤以為僅滿足輻射騷擾合規要求（GB 9254 / SRRC）即可覆蓋全部EMC義務——韓國KC要求同時證明輻射騷擾和抗擾度合規。製造商應與KC認可測試實驗室確認KN 35下其具體產品類別適用的EMS騷擾現象和性能準則等級。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — KN 35 KC EMC immunity certification required for consumer electronics and wireless IoT devices before South Korea market entry under Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act and Radio Waves Act
mandatory_status.cn: Conditional — EMS testing required for CCC-scope products with applicable immunity requirements under GB/T 17626; not universally mandated for all wireless/IoT products

source.publisher: Korean Agency for Technology and Standards (KATS) — Ministry of Trade, Industry and Energy (MOTIE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] KN 35 KC EMC immunity (EMS) compliance is mandatory for consumer wireless and IoT devices before South Korea market entry. Chinese GB/T 17626 / CCC EMS documentation is not equivalent. Testing must be conducted by a KC-accredited conformity assessment body to KN 35 (CISPR 35-aligned) immunity levels and performance criteria. Products where China does not require EMS testing will require a complete new immunity test campaign for the Korean market. Both emissions (KN 32) and immunity (KN 35) must be demonstrated under the KC scheme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 消费类无线及物联网设备进入韩国市场前，须强制满足KN 35 KC EMC抗扰度（EMS）合规要求。中国GB/T 17626 / CCC EMS文件不具同等效力。须由KC认可合格评定机构依据KN 35（CISPR 35对应）抗扰度等级及性能准则进行测试。中国不要求EMS测试的产品须为韩国市场重新进行完整的抗扰度测试。KC体系要求同时证明辐射骚扰（KN 32）和抗扰度（KN 35）合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 消費類無線及物聯網裝置進入韓國市場前，須強制滿足KN 35 KC EMC抗擾度（EMS）合規要求。中國GB/T 17626 / CCC EMS文件不具同等效力。須由KC認可合格評定機構依據KN 35（CISPR 35對應）抗擾度等級及性能準則進行測試。中國不要求EMS測試的產品須為韓國市場重新進行完整的抗擾度測試。KC體系要求同時證明輻射騷擾（KN 32）和抗擾度（KN 35）合規。
